title: OlderSkins
body:
在正式版1.19.3以后，添加了除Steve和Alex外的5种皮肤

**After the version 1.19.3, five kinds of skins were added except Steve and Alex.**

如果你不喜欢这些皮肤，可以安装这个Mod

**If you don't like these skins, you can install this Mod.**

此模组只需要在客户端安装，安装后你离线时或玩关闭在线模式的服务器皮肤只会出现Steve和Alex,在这种情况下其他人的皮肤也会变成Steve和Alex

**This mod only needs to be installed on the client. After installation, only Steve and Alex will appear on the server skin when you are offline or playing turn off online mode' server. In this case, other people's skins will also become Steve and Alex.**
